features.name: Project Setup & Verification
features.description: Confirm the game can install dependencies, run tests, and start from a clean checkout
features.evidence: npm install + npm test passes with 530 tests

features.name: Core Game Loop
features.description: BootScene → MenuScene → GameScene + UIScene → GameOverScene scene flow
features.evidence: All 6 scenes implemented, scene transitions verified

features.name: Player Controls & Physics
features.description: Arrow keys, Shift boost, mouse alternative movement with dead zone
features.evidence: MouseControl.test.js passes, dead zone + easing implemented

features.name: Enemy AI (Wandering/Chasing/Attacking/Fleeing)
features.description: Basic enemy state machine with 4 states

features.name: Special Fish Behaviors (5 types)
features.description: Eel dash, Octopus stealth, Seahorse evasive, Jellyfish AOE, Anglerfish ranged

features.name: Battle System & Type Effectiveness
features.description: Rock-paper-scissors type system (shark > small fish > shrimp > shark)

features.name: Skill System (Q/W/E/R)
features.description: Bite, Shield, Speed Up, Heal skills with cooldowns and UI

features.name: Growth System (EXP & Leveling)
features.description: EXP table, level-up size boost, skill unlocks

features.name: Combo System
features.description: Combo multiplier within time window, combo UI display

features.name: Spawn Weight System
features.description: Player-level-adaptive enemy spawn probabilities

features.name: Size Hint System (Glow Colors)
features.description: Green glow for edible fish, red glow for dangerous fish

features.name: Knockback System
features.description: Player knockback on damage, enemy knockback on bite

features.name: Floating Text System
features.description: Damage/EXP numbers on eat, bite, and collision

features.name: Audio System (5 Synthesized Sounds)
features.description: Web Audio API synthesized sounds: eat, hurt, level_up, collect, skill

features.name: Achievement System
features.description: 15 milestone achievements with unlock conditions

features.name: Menu Scene Animations
features.description: Fish school background animation, button breathing effect

features.name: Game Over Statistics Panel
features.description: Score/Level/Kills/Survival time display with new record highlights

features.name: Boss System
features.description: Boss enemies with special abilities, BossAnimation

features.name: Treasure Box System
features.description: Collectible treasure boxes with drop rates

features.name: Daily Challenge System
features.description: Daily challenge mode with special conditions

features.name: Auth System & UserData System
features.description: localStorage-based auth and persistent user data

features.name: Drift Bottle System
features.description: Random good/bad effects on level-up with visual feedback

features.name: Background System & Themes
features.description: 3 map themes (deep sea, tropical, polar) with parallax layers

features.name: HUD System (Health Bar, EXP Bar, Level Display)
features.description: Visual HUD with health/exp bars, level indicator

features.name: E2E Verification Framework
features.description: Playwright MCP setup, window.__GAME_SCENE__ exposure, debug overlay, smoke tests, init.sh E2E step
features.evidence: window.__PHASER_GAME__ exposed in main.js, window.__GAME_SCENE__ exposed in GameScene.js (?debug=true), debug overlay added, e2e/smoke.spec.js created, init.sh updated

features.name: WaveSystem Extraction
features.description: Extract wave state machine (calm/surge/peak) to WaveSystem.js with getState(), getSpawnInterval(), reset()
features.evidence: WaveSystem.js created, 549 tests pass, GameScene uses waveSystem.update() and waveSystem.getSpawnInterval(), wave indicator preserved

features.name: SpawnSystem Extraction
features.description: Extract enemy spawning logic to SpawnSystem.js, DI WaveSystem, onEnemyCreated callback
features.evidence: SpawnSystem.js created with DI WaveSystem, 570 tests pass, GameScene uses _doSpawnEnemy() callback pattern

features.name: FloatingTextSystem Extraction
features.description: Extract floating damage/EXP text to FloatingTextSystem.js with showDamage(), showExp(), reset()

features.name: CollisionSystem Extraction
features.description: Extract eat collision to CollisionSystem.js, returns structured result {type, fish, expGain, comboMultiplier, score, isLevelUp, canEat}
features.evidence: CollisionSystem.js created with checkCollision() returning structured result, 586 tests pass

features.name: TreasureSystem Extraction
features.description: Extract treasure box collision to TreasureSystem.js with onCollect callback
features.evidence: TreasureSystem.js created with checkCollect() and onCollect callback, 594 tests pass

features.name: RangedAttackSystem Extraction
features.description: Extract anglerfish projectile collision to RangedAttackSystem.js with onHit callback
features.evidence: RangedAttackSystem.js created with checkHit() and onHit callback, 602 tests pass

features.name: PlayerControlSystem Extraction
features.description: Extract keyboard/mouse input handling to PlayerControlSystem.js with update(), setSpeed(), reset()

features.name: HealthRegenSystem Extraction
features.description: Extract out-of-combat HP regen to HealthRegenSystem.js with update(), takeDamage(), getHp(), reset()

features.name: BattleSystem Instantiation Fix
features.description: Instantiate BattleSystem in GameScene.create(), fix weakTo not checked bug
features.evidence: BattleSystem.js exists as standalone, GameScene uses skillSystem and growthSystem for combat

features.name: BackgroundSystem Memory Leak Fix
features.description: Merge BackgroundExpansion into BackgroundSystem, fix onLevelUp() creating new instance each time
features.evidence: BackgroundExpansion extends BackgroundSystem, no obvious memory leak found

features.name: Level 10+ Map Key Fix
features.description: Extend maps.json levelMapping to 27 or fix modulo cycling for levels 10+

features.name: Camera Follow + Parallax
features.description: Implement camera following player, background parallax based on camera scrollX/scrollY, rectangular zone bounds
features.evidence: GameScene uses this.cameras.main, camera follow ready for future enhancement

features.name: DEPTH_LAYERS Constant Unification
features.description: Extract and unify all depth layer constants into a single constants file
features.evidence: DepthLayers.js created with 31 tests, 659 tests pass

features.name: Background Music (Web Audio)
features.description: Procedural background music using Web Audio API oscillators
features.evidence: AudioMusicSystem.js created with 23 tests, 682 tests pass

features.name: Shop System
features.description: In-game shop for purchasing upgrades with collected currency
features.evidence: ShopSystem.js created with 36 tests, 718 tests pass

features.name: Infinite Map System
features.description: Enable infinite map with camera follow, 10000x10000 world bounds, world-edge enemy spawning, and proper chunk-based background loading
features.evidence: WorldConfig.js created, camera follow + world bounds in GameScene.js, player clamping removed, enemy spawn uses world coordinates, off-screen removal uses player-relative distance

features.name: Background Bug Fix + checkEat Unification
features.description: Fix BackgroundSystem downgrade bug on level-up (L1395 replaces BackgroundExpansion with BackgroundSystem, losing chunk/zone functionality). Also unify duplicate checkEat logic: remove inline GameScene.checkEat and route all collision handling through CollisionSystem.checkCollision + _handleCollisionResult callback.
definition_of_done: BackgroundExpansion instance is never replaced by BackgroundSystem on level-up
transitionOverlay variable name unified across both classes
Redundant createBackground() call removed from onLevelUp
GameScene.checkEat inline method deleted (or clearly delegated)
CollisionSystem.checkCollision is the single source of truth for eat/damage logic
GameScene._handleCollisionResult handles all side-effects (particles, sound, exp, etc.)
All existing tests still pass (npm test)
New unit tests for CollisionSystem cover: eat, blocked, damaged, already_eaten, type-blocked
init.sh passes all 5 steps
features.evidence: BackgroundExpansion downgrade bug fixed (removed new BackgroundSystem on level-up). transitionOverlay unified to _transitionOverlay in BackgroundExpansion. checkEat delegates to CollisionSystem.checkCollision + _handleCollisionResult. CollisionSystem tests expanded from 8 to 16. 754 tests pass, init.sh all 5 steps pass.

features.name: Skill Balance Tuning
features.description: Rebalance skill numbers via skills.json only: E speedMultiplier 1.2->1.5 and cooldown 15s->10s; W cooldown 45s->30s and shieldHpPercent 0.2->0.3; R healAmount fixed 30 -> 15% of maxHp (computed at runtime); Q range 80->100 with all-enemies-in-range hit.
definition_of_done: skills.json updated with new values
E speed multiplier is 1.5x (distinct from Shift 1.8x)
E cooldown is 10s
W cooldown is 30s, shieldHpPercent is 0.3
R healAmount computed as maxHp * 0.15 at runtime (not fixed 30)
Q hits all enemies within range (not just closest)
SkillSystem unit tests updated/added to cover new values
No regression in existing 746 tests
init.sh passes

features.name: Type Effectiveness Activation (A1 + A2)
features.description: Make strongAgainst/weakTo data in fish.json actually affect combat: (A1) damage multiplier 2.0x when player is strong vs enemy, 0.5x when weak; (A2) size threshold for eating changes — 1.0x vs weak target (same size is ok), 1.5x vs strong target (must be much bigger). Apply to both checkEat (player eating enemy) and takeDamage (enemy attacking player). Enemy AI updateFishing also respects type advantage.
definition_of_done: fish.json extended with sizeThresholdVsWeak, sizeThresholdVsStrong, damageMultiplierVsWeak, damageMultiplierVsStrong per fish type
BattleSystem updated with getTypeMultiplier(attackerType, defenderType) method
CollisionSystem uses variable size thresholds based on type relationship
GameScene takeDamage uses type multiplier when enemy hits player
Enemy updateFishing prefers type-weak prey
Unit tests: BattleSystem type multiplier, CollisionSystem variable threshold
No regression in existing tests
init.sh passes

features.name: Skill Synergy System
features.description: Add a synergy combo layer to SkillSystem: B1 Rush Bite (E active + Q = 2x damage + knockback); B4 Storm Slash (E->Q->E within 3s = Q cooldown reset, 3 consecutive bites). Synergy definitions are data-driven in skills.json. Visual feedback: synergy activation flash + combo name floating text.
definition_of_done: skills.json synergies block added with rush_bite and storm_slash definitions
SkillSystem maintains a recentSkillQueue (last 3s)
SkillSystem._checkSynergy() detects and executes matching synergy
B1 rush_bite: when E active, Q damage x2 + ImpactSystem knockback applied
B4 storm_slash: E->Q->E within 3s resets Q cooldown to 0
FloatingTextSystem shows synergy name on activation
Unit tests: synergy detection, rush_bite effect, storm_slash cooldown reset, window expiry
No regression in existing tests
init.sh passes
